pi_items.source: task description and verifier.py logic where target_duration_s is strictly enforced.
verifier.py where the tolerance dynamically loads the metadata value to establish scoring bounds.
scripts/install_ardour.sh where ffmpeg explicitly transcodes the original MP3 to a 44100 Hz WAV file.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on non-synthetic data, utilizing a real human speech recording (Sun Tzu's Art of War) downloaded from LibriVox via Internet Archive. Scripts confirm this audio is transcoded to exactly 30 seconds at a 44100 Hz sample rate. The verifier explicitly enforces that the audio region is time-stretched (not trimmed) to a target duration of 25.0 seconds, allowing a tolerance of 0.2 seconds.
